DispatchCondition.Title: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871, VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879

ListItem.Para: Associated lavatory door is locked closed and placarded, "INOPERATIVE - DO NOT ENTER".

Note.Para: These provisions are not intended to prohibit lavatory use or inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative component and lock associated lavatory door (AMM DDG 25-41-04).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate or isolate inoperative lavatory ECU.
Close, lock and placard the associated lavatory door.

OperationNote.Para: Lavatory door should remain locked closed, except for use or inspection by crew members.

ListItem.Para: Associated lavatory door is locked closed and placarded, "INOPERATIVE - DO NOT ENTER".

Note.Para: These provisions are not intended to prohibit lavatory use or inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative component and lock associated lavatory door (AMM DDG 25-41-04).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate or isolate inoperative lavatory ECU.
Close, lock and placard the associated lavatory door.

OperationNote.Para: Lavatory door should remain locked closed, except for use or inspection by crew members.
